id.description: SHA256 of (ts + skill + session_id + event_type + severity + json(details) + source_entry_id). Computed on append; immutable.

skill.description: Qor skill that emitted this event.

session_id.description: Session identifier: <UTC-ISO-MIN>-<6hex> or a bootstrap label.

details.description: Event-specific payload; shape depends on event_type.

source_entry_id.description: For aged_high_severity_unremediated: the id of the event being escalated. Null otherwise.

addressed_pending.description: Phase 36 two-stage flip: true when /qor-remediate has filed a remediation proposal targeting this event; remains true after /qor-audit PASSes the proposal (addressed also flips true). Optional for backward compatibility with legacy events (issue_created/stale closure paths).

justification.description: Phase 54: free-text justification supplied by operator when override-friction threshold has been reached for the session. Required by qor.scripts.override_friction.record_with_justification at runtime when count >= threshold; not enforced by schema (no allOf rule) because the threshold is per-session rather than per-event.
